headline: From a small wheel corner to a full studio rhythm.
description: Atelier Amari began as a way to reconnect daily objects with touch, variation, and intention.
paragraphs: The atelier started with evening experiments in local clay, testing how surface and silhouette could shape the feeling of a meal or a room.
As demand grew, we expanded into a collaborative studio practice where hand-throwing, glazing, and firing remain fully integrated.
Today, each collection and commission continues that same philosophy: practical forms elevated by nuanced craft.
